headline: Stocks to Watch Friday Recap: Marvell, Costco, Gap
summary: ? Costco (COST): The warehouse retailer posted strong quarterly results, boosted by both product sales and membership fees. Shares added 1.6% Friday. ↗️ Marvell Technology (MRVL): The semiconductor company posted strong quarterly earnings, driven by AI demand, plus upbeat revenue projections.

headline: Bitcoin prices fall, Nike braces for $300M charge from layoffs
summary: Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre tracks Friday's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute. Bitcoin (BTC-USD) prices are sliding after a brief rally earlier in the week. Nike (NKE) is bracing for a $300 million charge tied to post-layoff severance charges. Stay up to date on the latest market action, minute-by-minute, with Yahoo Finance's Market Minute.

headline: Nike Could Be One Step Closer to Converse Sale as Swoosh Reveals $300 Million in Restructuring Costs
summary: Nike revealed in an 8-K filing on Thursday that it will report pre-tax charges of $300 million, primarily in employee severance costs.

headline: Trump tariffs: Customs and Border Protection tells judge it can't comply with refund order
summary: CBP told Court of International Trade Judge Richard Eaton that the total amount of IEEPA tariffs duties collected since last year is about $166 billion.

headline: Nike Restructuring And Severance Charge Test Turnaround Under New CEO
summary: Nike (NYSE:NKE) announced a major restructuring initiative with about US$300 million in pre tax charges tied to employee severance. The plan comes alongside a new leadership phase under CEO Elliott Hill, with an emphasis on streamlining operations and focused performance athleticwear. The restructuring includes significant job cuts and cost realignment that are expected to create short term disruption while shifting the company toward a leaner model. Nike sits at the center of global...
